# IKImageStateReady

**Global Variable**

The receiver’s represented object has been set and the cell is ready to display.

## Declaration

```swift
var IKImageStateReady: IKImageBrowserCellState { get }
```

## Constants

- **IKImageStateNoImage**: Returned until a thumbnail has been created from the represented object.
- **IKImageStateInvalid**: The thumbnail is invalid. For example, an unsupported image is provided.

items.description: Returned until a thumbnail has been created from the represented object.
